source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
NULL AS DIVISION
,CALL_ID
,TIMESTAMP
,CAMPAIGN
,CALL_TYPE
,AGENT
,CASE WHEN AGENT_NAME IN ('Michael McKenzie','Micheal Mckenzie') THEN 'Michael McKenzie' ELSE AGENT_NAME END AS AGENT_NAME
,(CASE WHEN DISPOSITION ='' THEN NULL ELSE DISPOSITION END ) AS DISPOSITION
,SUBSTRING(ANI,1,3) AS ANI_CODE
,ANI
,CUSTOMER_NAME
,DNIS
,CALL_TIME
,IVR_TIME
,QUEUE_WAIT_TIME
,RING_TIME
,TALK_TIME
,HOLD_TIME
,PARK_TIME
,AFTER_CALL_WORK_TIME
,ABANDONED
,RECORDINGS
,CASE WHEN ISDate(date)=1 THEN CAST(DATE AS DATE) ELSE NULL END AS DATE
,HOUR
,SUBSTRING(TIMESTAMP, LEN(TIMESTAMP) - 8,9) AS TIME
,CAMPAIGN_TYPE
,NO_PARTY_CONTACT
,SKILL
,SERVICE_LEVEL
,CONTACTED
,LIVE_CONNECT
,CALLS
,LIST_NAME
,SESSION_ID
,SPEED_OF_ANSWER
,AGENT_GROUP
,CALLS_COMPLETED_IN_IVR
,CONTACT_ID
,CUSTID
,LOCAL_ANI
,(CASE WHEN SOURCE='' THEN NULL ELSE SOURCE END) AS SOURCE
,(CASE WHEN SUBSOURCE='' THEN NULL ELSE SUBSOURCE END) AS SUBSOURCE
,NUMBER3
,COMPANY
,DATEUPLOADED
,NUMBER1
,NUMBER2
,(CASE WHEN PRODUCT='' THEN NULL ELSE PRODUCT END)  AS PRODUCT
,CONTACT_CREATE_DATE_TIME
,LEAD_ID
,LPRECTYPE
,ANR_LOGIT_RANK
,LPRECKEY
,NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS
,(CASE WHEN SOURCEGROUP='' THEN NULL ELSE SOURCEGROUP END) AS SOURCEGROUP
,AB_TEST
,LANGUAGE
,DIAL_TIME
,TIME_TO_ABANDON
,MANUAL_TIME
,HANDLE_TIME
,CONSULT_TIME
,TOTAL_QUEUE_TIME
,PREVIEW_TIME
,QUEUE_CALLBACK_WAIT_TIME
,(CASE WHEN MARKET='' THEN NULL ELSE MARKET END) AS MARKET
,GETDATE() AS LAST_UPDATED_TS
,NULL AS DIVISION_ORIG
,NULL AS LP_CUSTID
,NULL AS LP_LEADID
,NULL AS LP_BranchID
,NULL AS LP_Product
,NULL AS LP_SourceGroup
,NULL AS LP_SourceCode
,NULL AS LP_LeadSubSource
,NULL AS LP_DISPOSITION
,SIP_REFER
,SIP_RESPONSE_CODE
,SIP_REFER_DESTINATION
,SIP_REFER_SOURCE
FROM ODS.FIVE9_RENUITY_CALL_LOGS_ALL
WHERE COALESCE(DATEUPLOADED,'NA') NOT LIKE '%INQ%'

sink.preCopyScript:
DELETE FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL
WHERE CAST(DATE AS DATE) IN (SELECT DISTINCT CAST((CASE WHEN ISDate(date)=1 THEN DATE ELSE '2099-01-01' END ) AS DATE) FROM [ODS].[FIVE9_RENUITY_CALL_LOGS_ALL])
AND DATA_IDENTIFIER ='ALL_DIVISION'

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
'MAC' AS DIVISION	,
SESSION_ID	,
CALL_ID	,
CONTACT_ID	,
TIMESTAMP	,
DATE	,
HOUR	,
SUBSTRING(TIMESTAMP, LEN(TIMESTAMP) - 8,9) AS TIME	,
CALL_TYPE	,
CAMPAIGN_TYPE	,
CAMPAIGN	,
SKILL	,
LIST_NAME	,
AGENT_GROUP	,
AGENT_NAME	,
AGENT	,
CUSTOMER_NAME	,
NULL AS ANI_CODE	,
ANI	,
DNIS	,
(CASE WHEN DISPOSITION ='' THEN NULL ELSE DISPOSITION END ) AS DISPOSITION ,
CALLS	,
ABANDONED	,
CONTACTED	,
LIVE_CONNECT	,
NO_PARTY_CONTACT	,
SPEED_OF_ANSWER	,
SERVICE_LEVEL	,
CALLS_COMPLETED_IN_IVR	,
company	,
CustID	,
lead_id	,
CONVERT(VARCHAR, CAST(REPLACE(CONTACT_CReATE_TIMESTAMP, LEFT(CONTACT_CReATE_TIMESTAMP, CHARINDEX(',', CONTACT_CReATE_TIMESTAMP) + 1), '') AS DATETIME), 120) AS CONTACT_CREATE_TIMESTAMP,
number1	,
number2	,
number3	,
anr_logit_rank	,
(CASE WHEN MARKET='' THEN NULL ELSE MARKET END) AS Market	,
NULL AS PRODUCT	,
(CASE WHEN SOURCEGROUP='' THEN NULL ELSE SOURCEGROUP END) AS SourceGroup	,
(CASE WHEN SOURCE='' THEN NULL ELSE SOURCE END) AS Source	,
(CASE WHEN SUBSOURCE='' THEN NULL ELSE SUBSOURCE END) AS Subsource	,
Language	,
NULL AS LPRECTYPE	,
NULL AS LPRECKEY	,
DateUploaded	,
NULL AS NUMBER_OF_ATTEMPTS	,
NULL AS LOCAL_ANI	,
NULL AS AB_TEST	,
CALL_TIME	,
DIAL_TIME	,
RING_TIME	,
TIME_TO_ABANDON	,
MANUAL_TIME	,
HANDLE_TIME	,
CONSULT_TIME	,
QUEUE_CALLBACK_WAIT_TIME	,
PREVIEW_TIME	,
AFTER_CALL_WORK_TIME	,
TOTAL_QUEUE_TIME	,
QUEUE_WAIT_TIME	,
HOLD_TIME	,
TALK_TIME	,
PARK_TIME	,
IVR_TIME	,
RECORDINGS	,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS,
'MAC_NEW_SERVER' AS DATA_IDENTIFIER,
'MAC' AS DIVISION_ORIG
,NULL AS LP_CUSTID
,NULL AS LP_LEADID
,NULL AS LP_BranchID
,NULL AS LP_Product
,NULL AS LP_SourceGroup
,NULL AS LP_SourceCode
,NULL AS LP_LeadSubSource
,NULL AS LP_DISPOSITION
,SIP_REFER
,SIP_RESPONSE_CODE
,SIP_REFER_DESTINATION
,SIP_REFER_SOURCE
FROM [ODS].[FIVE9_CALLS_MAC]
WHERE Call_ID!='and Don Tucker"'

sink.preCopyScript:
DELETE FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL
WHERE CAST(DATE AS DATE) IN (SELECT DISTINCT(CAST(DATE AS DATE)) FROM [ODS].[FIVE9_CALLS_MAC])
AND DATA_IDENTIFIER ='MAC_NEW_SERVER'

scripts.text:
--********** TEMP TABLES START*********

SELECT Division,LeadID,CustomerID,DispositionID,BranchID,ProductID,LeadSubSourceID 
INTO #T_LEAD
FROM EDW.FACT_LEAD;



SELECT InboundQueueLogID,
LeadID
INTO #T_FACT_INBOUND_QUEUE_LOG
FROM EDW.FACT_INBOUND_QUEUE_LOG;


SELECT * INTO #T_DISPOSITION FROM EDW.DIM_DISPOSITION;
SELECT * INTO #T_PRODUCT FROM EDW.DIM_PRODUCT;
SELECT * INTO #T_BRANCH FROM EDW.DIM_BRANCH;


--***********************
--SUBSTRING(LPRecKey,1,3) ='LDS'


UPDATE A 
SET A.LP_LeadID 	= B.LeadID
FROM
EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL A
JOIN #T_LEAD B
ON CONCAT( A.Division,'-',SUBSTRING(A.LPRecKey,4,12) ) = B.LeadID   -- LDS KEY JOIN
WHERE SUBSTRING(A.LPRecKey,1,3) ='LDS'
AND A.LP_LeadID IS NULL
AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE); -- ***( LPRECTYPE ='cst' only)



UPDATE A 
SET A.LP_LeadID 	= B.LeadID
FROM
EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL A
JOIN #T_LEAD B
ON CONCAT( A.Division,'-',A.Lead_ID ) = B.LeadID			-- LEAD_ID Join
WHERE SUBSTRING(A.LPRecKey,1,3) ='LDS'
AND A.LP_LeadID IS NULL
AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);




--**********************
--SUBSTRING(LPRecKey,1,3) ='INQ'

UPDATE A 
SET A.LP_LeadID = C.LeadID
FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL A
JOIN #T_FACT_INBOUND_QUEUE_LOG B
    ON CONCAT(A.Division, '-', SUBSTRING(A.LPRecKey, 4, 12)) = B.InboundQueueLogID
JOIN #T_LEAD C
    ON B.LeadID = C.LeadID
WHERE SUBSTRING(A.LPRecKey, 1, 3) = 'INQ'
  AND A.LP_LeadID IS NULL
  AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);


--SUBSTRING(LPRecKey,1,3) ='INQ' AND LPRECTYPE='cst'

UPDATE A 
SET A.LP_LeadID 	= B.LeadID
FROM
EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL A
JOIN #T_LEAD B
ON CONCAT( A.Division,'-',A.Lead_ID ) = B.LeadID
WHERE  SUBSTRING(A.LPRecKey,1,3) ='INQ'
AND A.LPRECTYPE='cst' 
AND (SUBSTRING(A.LPRecKey,4,12) != A.Lead_ID)  
AND  A.LP_LeadID IS NULL
AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);


--SUBSTRING(LPRecKey,1,3) IS NULL AND LPRECTYPE='cst'

UPDATE A 
SET A.LP_LeadID 	= B.LeadID
FROM
EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL A
JOIN #T_LEAD B
ON CONCAT( A.Division,'-',A.Lead_ID ) = B.LeadID
WHERE A.LPRecKey IS NULL
AND A.LPRECTYPE='cst'
AND  A.LP_LeadID IS NULL
AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);


--SUBSTRING(LPRecKey,1,3) IS NULL AND LPRECTYPE='inq'

UPDATE A 
SET A.LP_LeadID 	= C.LeadID
FROM
EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL A
JOIN #T_FACT_INBOUND_QUEUE_LOG B
ON  CONCAT( A.Division,'-',A.Lead_ID ) = B.InboundQueueLogID

JOIN #T_LEAD C
ON B.LEadID = C.LeadID
WHERE A.LPRecKey IS NULL 
AND  A.LP_LeadID IS NULL -- Whichever not found in INQ check their cst - LeadID
AND A.LPRECTYPE='inq' 
AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);


--############### UPDATE DISPOSTITION ##################

UPDATE  [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]  
SET Disposition=call_type
WHERE CALL_TYPE IN ('Queue Callback','3rd party transfer','3rd party conference')
AND CAST(DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);



--############### UPDATE FOR NEW TABLE TO HAVE CONSISTEN VALUES ##################




UPDATE  A
SET A.LP_CustID = B.CustomerID
FROM [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]  A 
JOIN #T_LEAD B 
ON A.LP_LeadID = B.LeadID
AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);



UPDATE  A
SET A.LP_Product = D.ProductName
FROM [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]  A 
JOIN #T_LEAD B 
ON A.LP_LeadID = B.LeadID
JOIN #T_PRODUCT D 
ON B.ProductID = D.ProductID
WHERE CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);



UPDATE  A
SET 
A.LP_SOURCEGROUP   = LSS.SOURCEGROUP,
A.LP_SOURCECODE    = LSS.SourceCode,
A.LP_LeadSUBSOURCE = LSS.LeadSubSource
FROM [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]  A 
JOIN #T_LEAD B 
ON A.LP_LeadID = B.LeadID
JOIN  [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING] LSS 
ON B.LeadSubSourceID = LSS.LeadSubSourceID
WHERE 
   LSS.SOURCEGROUP NOT IN ('', '0')
  AND LSS.SourceCode NOT IN ('', '0')
  AND LSS.LeadSubSource NOT IN ('', '0')
 AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);



--################## BRANCH Logic STARTS ###################
--################## POPULATE ALL BRANCH ID HERE #################

UPDATE  A
SET A.LP_BranchID = D.LP_BranchID
FROM [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]  A 
JOIN #T_LEAD B 
ON A.LP_LeadID = B.LeadID
JOIN #T_BRANCH D 
ON B.BranchID = D.BranchID
WHERE CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);


-- NULLify the LP_BranchID where Market COlumn has valid Branch Available
UPDATE  A
SET A.LP_BranchID = NULL
FROM [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL]  A 
JOIN #T_BRANCH D 
ON A.Market = D.LP_BranchID
AND A.DIvision = D.Division
AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);


--*********** BRANCH Logic END ******************

--********* Single Market Division Update *************


WITH M1 AS 
(
-- Remove Duplicate Market Code 
	SELECT DISTINCT 
	MARKET 
	FROM 
	(
		SELECT A.*,B.LP_BranchID,B.Division,B.LongName,
		COUNT(1) OVER (PARTITION BY Market ) AS MULTI_DIV_MARKET
		FROM  ( SELECT DISTINCT Market FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL )  A 
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B
		ON A.Market = B.LP_BranchID
		) M1
	WHERE MULTI_DIV_MARKET=1
	),
	
M2 AS 

(
-- Check Market Available in DIM
SELECT Market,Division FROM 
	(
		SELECT A.*,B.LP_BranchID,B.Division,B.LongName
		FROM  M1  A 
		JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B
		ON A.Market = B.LP_BranchID
		) AX
	
	)


UPDATE TGT 
SET TGT.Division = SRC.Division 
FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL TGT 
JOIN M2 SRC 
ON TGT.Market = SRC.Market
WHERE TGT.Division IS NULL 
AND TGT.DATA_IDENTIFIER = 'ALL_DIVISION'
AND CAST(TGT.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);



--***********Pending NULL DIvisions ***********

WITH CALL_LOG AS 
(
SELECT  
CAMPAIGN,
MAX(COALESCE(DIV_CAMP_N,DIV_SKILL_N)) AS DIV_N

FROM 
(
	SELECT 
		CAMPAIGN,
		CASE 
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('CAM','HO','Home Org')					THEN 'CTA'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('FHI','FHIA')							THEN 'FHI'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('HSI')									THEN 'HSI'
			WHEN SUBSTRING(SKILL_DIV,1,3) IN ('MC','MCW','MAC')			THEN 'MAC'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('MAX')									THEN 'MXH'
			WHEN SUBSTRING(SKILL_DIV,1,3) IN ('PBC','PB')				THEN 'PBC'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('PHI')									THEN 'PHI'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('RIT')									THEN 'RTW'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('SWR')									THEN 'SWR'
			ELSE NULL END AS DIV_SKILL_N,
		
		CASE 
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('CAM','HO','Home Org')																		THEN 'CTA'
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('FHI','FHIA')																					THEN 'FHI'
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('HSI','BR')																					THEN 'HSI'
			WHEN SUBSTRING(CAMPAIGN_DIV,1,3) IN ('MC','MCW','MAC','OB')															THEN 'MAC'
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('MAX')																						THEN 'MXH'
			WHEN SUBSTRING(CAMPAIGN_DIV,1,3) IN ('HFB','Pac','PBC','PB') OR ( CAMPAIGN LIKE '%PBC%' OR CAMPAIGN LIKE '%HFB%')	THEN 'PBC'
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('PHI','zPHI') OR CAMPAIGN LIKE '%PHI%'														THEN 'PHI'
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('RTW','RIT') 																					THEN 'RTW'
			WHEN SUBSTRING(CAMPAIGN_DIV,1,3) IN	('SWR') 																		THEN 'SWR'
			ELSE NULL END AS DIV_CAMP_N
			
			
			FROM
			(
				SELECT DISTINCT
				CAMPAIGN,
				CASE WHEN CHARINDEX('-', CAMPAIGN)=0 THEN SUBSTRING(CAMPAIGN,1,3) ELSE  LEFT(CAMPAIGN, CHARINDEX('-', CAMPAIGN) - 1) END AS CAMPAIGN_DIV,
				CASE WHEN CHARINDEX('-', SKILL)=0 THEN SUBSTRING(SKILL,1,3) ELSE  LEFT(SKILL, CHARINDEX('-', SKILL) - 1) END AS SKILL_DIV
				FROM [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL] 
				WHERE Data_Identifier='ALL_DIVISION'
				AND CAMPAIGN NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
				AND CAMPAIGN NOT IN 
				(  'Default ANI Callbacks'	,
					'Test - New Logic testing'	,
					'DO NOT USE'	,
					'Test - five9'	,
					'Reset-Internet Reset'	,
					'Data-New Internet'	,
					'Cancel Save'	,
					'Jeff List'	,
					'SMS Outbound Test'	,
					'SMS Outbound'	,
					'Test - Lead Power Test'	,
					'Jeff Renuity List'	,
					'SMS Inbound'	,
					'Invoca Test'	,
					'Test - five9 - Sam'	,
					'[None]'	,
					'Dial Plan C'	,
					'Renuity TV - Paid Search SWR'	,
					'zTest - Ryan',
					'[Deleted]'	

					)
				-- ADD 6 MONTH FILTER HERE
				) M1
				
		) M2
		
	GROUP BY CAMPAIGN
	
	)
		
		
		


UPDATE A
SET A.Division = C.DIV_N
FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL A
JOIN CALL_LOG C
ON A.CAMPAIGN = C.CAMPAIGN
WHERE Data_Identifier ='ALL_DIVISION'
AND A.Division IS NULL
AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);




-- MAC NEW SERVER  Division Update

UPDATE EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL  SET DIVISION='MAC' 
WHERE Data_Identifier !='ALL_DIVISION' 
AND  CAST(DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);

UPDATE EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL SET DIVISION_ORIG = DIVISION 
WHERE DIVISION_ORIG IS NULL 
AND DIVISION IS NOT NULL 
AND CAST(DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);


UPDATE EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL SET DIVISION='RTW',DIVISION_ORIG='RTW' WHERE DIVISION='HSI' AND CAST(DATE AS DATE) >='2025-02-03' AND DATA_IDENTIFIER='ALL_DIVISION';

UPDATE EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL SET DIVISION='CTA',DIVISION_ORIG='CTA' WHERE DIVISION='PHI' AND DATA_IDENTIFIER='ALL_DIVISION';

--********* Single Market Division Update *************


WITH M1 AS 
(
-- Remove Duplicate Market Code 
	SELECT DISTINCT 
	MARKET 
	FROM 
	(
		SELECT A.*,B.LP_BranchID,B.Division,B.LongName,
		COUNT(1) OVER (PARTITION BY Market ) AS MULTI_DIV_MARKET
		FROM  ( SELECT DISTINCT Market FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL  WHERE DATA_IDENTIFIER = 'ALL_DIVISION' AND DIVISION!='MXH'  -- ** NEW 
		)  A 
		LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B
		ON A.Market = B.LP_BranchID
		) M1
	WHERE MULTI_DIV_MARKET=1
	),
	
M2 AS 

(
-- Check Market Available in DIM
SELECT Market,Division FROM 
	(
		SELECT A.*,B.LP_BranchID,B.Division,B.LongName
		FROM  M1  A 
		JOIN EDW.DIM_BRANCH B
		ON A.Market = B.LP_BranchID
		) AX
	
	)


UPDATE TGT 
SET TGT.Division = SRC.Division 
FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL TGT 
JOIN M2 SRC 
ON TGT.Market = SRC.Market
WHERE TGT.Division IS NULL 
AND TGT.DATA_IDENTIFIER = 'ALL_DIVISION'
AND CAST(TGT.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);



--***********Pending NULL DIvisions ***********

WITH CALL_LOG AS 
(
SELECT  
CAMPAIGN,
MAX(COALESCE(DIV_CAMP_N,DIV_SKILL_N)) AS DIV_N

FROM 
(
	SELECT 
		CAMPAIGN,
		CASE 
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('CAM','HO','Home Org')					THEN 'CTA'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('FHI','FHIA')							THEN 'FHI'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('HSI')									THEN 'HSI'
			WHEN SUBSTRING(SKILL_DIV,1,3) IN ('MC','MCW','MAC')			THEN 'MAC'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('MAX')									THEN 'FHI'  -- ** NEW
			WHEN SUBSTRING(SKILL_DIV,1,3) IN ('PBC','PB')				THEN 'PBC'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('PHI')									THEN 'PHI'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('RIT')									THEN 'RTW'
			WHEN SKILL_DIV IN ('SWR')									THEN 'SWR'
			ELSE NULL END AS DIV_SKILL_N,
		
		CASE 
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('CAM','HO','Home Org')																		THEN 'CTA'
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('FHI','FHIA')																					THEN 'FHI'
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('HSI','BR')																					THEN 'HSI'
			WHEN SUBSTRING(CAMPAIGN_DIV,1,3) IN ('MC','MCW','MAC','OB')															THEN 'MAC'
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('MAX')																						THEN 'FHI'  -- ** NEW
			WHEN SUBSTRING(CAMPAIGN_DIV,1,3) IN ('HFB','Pac','PBC','PB') OR ( CAMPAIGN LIKE '%PBC%' OR CAMPAIGN LIKE '%HFB%')	THEN 'PBC'
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('PHI','zPHI') OR CAMPAIGN LIKE '%PHI%'														THEN 'PHI'
			WHEN CAMPAIGN_DIV IN ('RTW','RIT') 																					THEN 'RTW'
			WHEN SUBSTRING(CAMPAIGN_DIV,1,3) IN	('SWR') 																		THEN 'SWR'
			ELSE NULL END AS DIV_CAMP_N
			
			
			FROM
			(
				SELECT DISTINCT
				CAMPAIGN,
				CASE WHEN CHARINDEX('-', CAMPAIGN)=0 THEN SUBSTRING(CAMPAIGN,1,3) ELSE  LEFT(CAMPAIGN, CHARINDEX('-', CAMPAIGN) - 1) END AS CAMPAIGN_DIV,
				CASE WHEN CHARINDEX('-', SKILL)=0 THEN SUBSTRING(SKILL,1,3) ELSE  LEFT(SKILL, CHARINDEX('-', SKILL) - 1) END AS SKILL_DIV
				FROM [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL] 
				WHERE Data_Identifier='ALL_DIVISION'
				AND CAMPAIGN NOT LIKE '%TEST%'
				AND CAMPAIGN NOT IN 
				(  'Default ANI Callbacks'	,
					'Test - New Logic testing'	,
					'DO NOT USE'	,
					'Test - five9'	,
					'Reset-Internet Reset'	,
					'Data-New Internet'	,
					'Cancel Save'	,
					'Jeff List'	,
					'SMS Outbound Test'	,
					'SMS Outbound'	,
					'Test - Lead Power Test'	,
					'Jeff Renuity List'	,
					'SMS Inbound'	,
					'Invoca Test'	,
					'Test - five9 - Sam'	,
					'[None]'	,
					'Dial Plan C'	,
					'Renuity TV - Paid Search SWR'	,
					'zTest - Ryan',
					'[Deleted]'	

					)
				-- ADD 6 MONTH FILTER HERE
				) M1
				
		) M2
		
	GROUP BY CAMPAIGN
	
	)
		
		
		


UPDATE A
SET A.Division = C.DIV_N
FROM EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL A
JOIN CALL_LOG C
ON A.CAMPAIGN = C.CAMPAIGN
WHERE Data_Identifier ='ALL_DIVISION'
AND A.Division IS NULL
AND CAST(A.DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);




-- MAC NEW SERVER  Division Update

UPDATE EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL  SET DIVISION='MAC' 
WHERE Data_Identifier !='ALL_DIVISION' 
AND  CAST(DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);

UPDATE EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL SET DIVISION_ORIG = DIVISION 
WHERE DIVISION_ORIG IS NULL 
AND DIVISION IS NOT NULL 
AND CAST(DATE AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE);


UPDATE EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL SET DIVISION='RTW',DIVISION_ORIG='RTW' WHERE DIVISION='HSI' AND CAST(DATE AS DATE) >='2025-02-03' AND DATA_IDENTIFIER='ALL_DIVISION';

UPDATE EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL SET DIVISION='CTA',DIVISION_ORIG='CTA' WHERE DIVISION='PHI' AND DATA_IDENTIFIER='ALL_DIVISION';

UPDATE EDW.FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL SET DIVISION='FHI',DIVISION_ORIG='FHI' WHERE DIVISION='MXH' AND CAST(DATE AS DATE) >='2026-01-12' AND DATA_IDENTIFIER='ALL_DIVISION';
DELETE FROM [ODS].[FIVE9_CALLS_MAC] WHERE Call_ID='and Don Tucker"';
